title: Team thinking, visualized by Claude
summary: Anthropic's Claude was used by Williams F1 Team and Atlassian to visualize the cognitive patterns of drivers and pit crew under race pressure. The "Pattern of Thought" project converted biometric or performance data into visual designs displayed on helmets, race suits, and garage displays.
